'''Arky's Emporium of Forgotten Treasures''' was an antique store ran by [[Seb Arkos|Seb "Arky" Arkos]]. Located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Xakrea]], Arky's Emporium got caught up in the four-way agenda of [[Hal Horn]], [[Ysanne Isard]], [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] and [[Moranda Savich]] around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

Among its stock were a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[chin-harp]] (sans [[Chord hammer]]) and a feline statue made of [[Ithorian toal wood|Ithorian ''toal'' wood]]. However, the shop was intended as a front for forged identification.

{{Struct-stub}}
